Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Dec-13-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Sargent, Esq. 650-327-9800 for Plaintiff.
Bruce Charles Funk, Esq. 408-280-6488 for Defendant Richard Luu.
Joe Wall, Esq. 408-494-0704 of Wall Law Firm for Defendant Than Di Diec.
Guyton Jinkerson, Esq. 408-297-6555 for Defendant LINH HUYNH and LOFAC, LLC.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its thoughts. Plaintiff argues fraud, contract. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT YOUNGMIN MCKOON, BUTECT LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, LINH HUYNH, RICHARD LUU, LOFAC, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

The motion and Petition are both Granted. The case is stayed except for any provisional remedies which any party may avail of as long as it fits within the last sentence of paragraph 27. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/HEK)

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its thoughts. Plaintiff argues fraud, contract. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
